human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: No human approval is required for this no-real-data/no-write tenant-scope metadata slice; explicit next subphase boundary is RP00.P01.M03.S04.

claude_findings.disposition_summary: Three P3 notes accepted as non-blocking: expected pre-promotion state, by-design frozen S01 future list, and cumulative-fixture top-level subphase pattern.

notes: HERMES_GATE_TENANT_SCOPE_POLICY binds HermesGate.tenant_id to canonical lfos_ lowercase snake-case tenant IDs.

normalizeHermesGateTenantId, validateHermesGateTenantId, and assertHermesGateTenantScope reject missing prefix, uppercase, hyphenated, double-underscore, path/URL-like, stored-whitespace, and cross-tenant forms.
CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_REGISTRY exposes hermesGateTenantScopePolicy while HermesGate remains implementedInFutureSubphase=true and implementedSubphase=null.
No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, secret, or production export data was used.
